title: RegisteredExternalService - Metadata API
description: Represents a registered external service, which provides an extension or integration.

configUrl.description: Link to the configuration page for the integration.

description.description: Description of the external service provider. This field is available in API version 59.0 and later.

documentationUrl.description: Link to documentation for the registered external service.

extensionPointName.description: This field is available in API version 55.0 and later. Name of an extension point. Possible values are: Commerce_Domain_BuyerGroup_EvaluationService—Available in API version 65.0 and later. Commerce_Domain_Cart_Calculate Commerce_Domain_Checkout_CreateOrder Commerce_Domain_Inventory_CartCalculator Commerce_Domain_Inventory_Service Commerce_Domain_OrderManagement_Product Commerce_Domain_Pricing_CartCalculator Commerce_Domain_Pricing_Service Commerce_Domain_Promotions_CartCalculator Commerce_Domain_Promotions_ShippingCalculator Commerce_Domain_Shipping_CartCalculator Commerce_Domain_Shipping_SplitShipment Commerce_Domain_Tax_CartCalculator Commerce_Domain_Tax_Service Commerce_Endpoint_Account_Address Commerce_Endpoint_Account_Addresses Commerce_Endpoint_Cart_Item—Available in API version 62.0 and later. Commerce_Endpoint_Cart_ItemCollection—Available in API version 62.0 and later. Commerce_Endpoint_Catalog_Product Commerce_Endpoint_Catalog_Products Commerce_Endpoint_Search_ProductSearch Commerce_Endpoint_Gift_Wraps—Available in API version 65.0 and later. Commerce_Endpoint_Search_Products Commerce_Endpoint_Search_ProductsByCategory

externalServiceProvider.description: The ID of an Apex class functioning as a provider. The Apex class can either implement one of the following interfaces: sfdc_checkout.CartInventoryValidation sfdc_checkout.CartPriceCalculations sfdc_checkout.CartShippingCharges sfdc_checkout.CartTaxCalculations or the Apex class can extend one of the base classes for an extension. See Available Extensions.

externalServiceProviderType.description: The type of external service provider. For an extension, you set the type to Extension, and you specify an extensionPointName. For example, for a Pricing Cart Calculator extension, you specify Commerce_Domain_Pricing_CartCalculator as the extensionPointName. For an integration, you set the type to one of the other possible values, such as Price, and you omit extensionPointName. Possible values are: Extension (this value is available in API version 55.0 and later) Inventory Price Promotions (this value is available in API version 53.0 and later) Shipment Tax

iconUri.description: URI of icon for the extension provider. This field is available in API version 59.0 and later.

isApplication.description: Indicates if the extension provider is contained within a managed package. The default value is false. This field is available in API version 59.0 and later.

isProtected.description: An auto-generated value that doesn’t impact the behavior of the metadata type. The default value is false.

masterLabel.description: The primary label for the RegisteredExternalService.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:simpleType name="ExtensionPointName">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Cart_Calculate"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Tax_CartCalculator"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Inventory_CartCalculator"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Promotions_CartCalculator"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Promotions_ShippingCalculator"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Pricing_CartCalculator"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Shipping_CartCalculator"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Inventory_Service"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Pricing_Service"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Tax_Service"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_BuyerGroup_EvaluationService"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Checkout_CreateOrder"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Checkout_PlaceOrder"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_Shipping_SplitShipment"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Domain_OrderManagement_Product"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Account_Addresses"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Account_Address"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Catalog_Products"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Catalog_Product"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Gift_Wraps"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Search_Products"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Search_ProductSearch"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Search_ProductsByCategory"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Search_Suggestions"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Cart_ItemCollection"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Commerce_Endpoint_Cart_Item"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="RegisteredExternalService">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="configUrl" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="documentationUrl" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="extensionPointName" minOccurs="0" type="tns:ExtensionPointName"/>
        <xsd:element name="externalServiceProvider" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="externalServiceProviderType" type="tns:RegistryProviderType"/>
        <xsd:element name="iconUri" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isApplication" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="RegistryProviderType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Price"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Promotions"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Inventory"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Shipment"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Tax"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Extension"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
```
